title: 安田記念の後に・名を呼んで

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue goes wild for King Halo as she
achieves another stunning victory in the Yasuda
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her overwhelming skill at sprints brings wonderful
results as she continues down her path to
becoming her own first-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She faces her fans with a big smile and announces
her next objective: the autumn G1 Sprinters
Stakes.
